system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.

{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3_reload","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_HISTORY3_RELOAD]
(
  @masp nvarchar(200),
  @ngaythang date
)
AS

DECLARE @mact nvarchar(50)
DECLARE @stt nvarchar(50)
DECLARE @chitiet nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @nguyenlieu nvarchar(50)
DECLARE @dayy_tc float
DECLARE @rong_tc float
DECLARE @dai_tc float
DECLARE @soluong_tc int
DECLARE @ghichu nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @ngaysua datetime
DECLARE @nguoisua nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @veneer_matchinh nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @veneer_matphu nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @mong1 float
DECLARE @mong2 float
DECLARE @veneer_dan_canh nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @veneer_canhngan int
DECLARE @veneer_canhdai int
DECLARE @uv_canhngan int
DECLARE @uv_canhdai int
DECLARE @uv_matchinh bit
DECLARE @uv_matphu bit


DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
  SELECT mact, stt, chitiet, nguyenlieu, 
  	dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc, ghichu,
  	ngaysua, nguoisua, 
	veneer_matchinh, veneer_matphu, isnull(mong1,0), isnull(mong2,0),
	veneer_dan_canh,veneer_canhdai,veneer_canhngan,
	uv_canhdai,uv_canhngan,uv_matchinh,uv_matphu
  FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan WITH(NOLOCK)
  WHERE masp = @masp
OPEN CUR
FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @mact, @stt, @chitiet, @nguyenlieu, @dayy_tc, @rong_tc, @dai_tc, 
                         @soluong_tc, @ghichu, @ngaysua, @nguoisua,
						 @veneer_matchinh, @veneer_matphu, @mong1, @mong2,
						 @veneer_dan_canh,@veneer_canhdai,@veneer_canhngan,
						 @uv_canhdai,@uv_canhngan,@uv_matchinh,@uv_matphu
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
  IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND mact = @mact AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
  BEGIN
    UPDATE tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3
    SET stt_new = @stt,
        tenct_new = @chitiet,
        nguyenlieu_new = @nguyenlieu,
        dayy_tc_new = @dayy_tc,
        rong_tc_new = @rong_tc,
        dai_tc_new = @dai_tc,
        soluong_tc_new = @soluong_tc,
        ghichu_new = @ghichu,
        actions_type = 'U',
        ngaysua = @ngaysua,
        nguoisua = @nguoisua,
		veneer_matchinh_new = @veneer_matchinh,
		veneer_matphu_new = @veneer_matphu,
		mong1_new = @mong1,
		mong2_new = @mong2,
		veneer_dan_canh_new = @veneer_dan_canh,
		veneer_canhdai_new = @veneer_canhdai,
		veneer_canhngan_new = @veneer_canhngan,
		uv_matchinh_new = @uv_matchinh,
		uv_matphu_new = @uv_matphu,
		uv_canhdai_new = @uv_canhdai,
		uv_canhngan_new = @uv_canhngan
    WHERE masp = @masp AND mact = @mact AND ngaythang = @ngaythang 
  END
  ELSE
  BEGIN
    INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3
	(
		id, ngaythang, masp, mact, stt_new, tenct_new, nguyenlieu_new, 
		dayy_tc_new, rong_tc_new, dai_tc_new, soluong_tc_new, 
		ghichu_new, actions_type, ngaysua, nguoisua, 
		veneer_matchinh_new, veneer_matphu_new,mong1_new,mong2_new,
		veneer_dan_canh_new, veneer_canhdai_new,veneer_canhngan_new,
		uv_canhdai_new,uv_canhngan_new,uv_matchinh_new,uv_matphu_new
	)
	VALUES 
	(
		newid(), @ngaythang, @masp, @mact, @stt, @chitiet, @nguyenlieu, 
		@dayy_tc, @rong_tc, @dai_tc, @soluong_tc, 
		@ghichu, 'I', @ngaysua, @nguoisua,
		@veneer_matchinh, @veneer_matphu, @mong1, @mong2,
		@veneer_dan_canh, @veneer_canhdai, @veneer_canhngan,
		@uv_canhdai,@uv_canhngan,@uv_matchinh,@uv_matphu
	)
  END
  
  FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @mact, @stt, @chitiet, @nguyenlieu, @dayy_tc, @rong_tc, @dai_tc, 
                           @soluong_tc, @ghichu, @ngaysua, @nguoisua,@veneer_matchinh,@veneer_matphu,@mong1,@mong2,
						   @veneer_dan_canh,
						   @veneer_canhdai,@veneer_canhngan,
						   @uv_canhdai,@uv_canhngan,@uv_matchinh,@uv_matphu
END
CLOSE CUR
DEALLOCATE CUR

UPDATE tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3
SET actions_type = 'D'
WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang AND actions_type IS NULL

--SELECT A.*,

--  CONCAT(IIF(ISNULL(A.mong1_old,0) <> 0, CONCAT(N'Mộng 1: ', A.mong1_old),''), CHAR(10), 
--  IIF(ISNULL(A.mong2_old,0) <> 0, CONCAT(N'Mộng 2: ', A.mong2_old),'')) as mong_old,
